title: Asset Purchase Agreement
description: A purchase contract for acquiring the specific physical and digital intellectual property assets of a startup.
whatsCovered: Detailed list of purchased assets (IP, software, code)
Excluded liabilities: buyer does not inherit old debts
Purchase price allocation and escrow details
Representations and warranties regarding intellectual property
whenToUse: Use this agreement when selling or buying the software code, brand assets, and customer databases of a startup without acquiring the corporate entity.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovators Blvd, San Francisco, CA

fields.label: Acquired Assets Summary
fields.placeholder: e.g. All software source code, customer registries, domain names, and trademarks...

clauses.heading: ASSET PURCHASE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This startup agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and the counterparty or stakeholders executing this document below.

clauses.heading: 1. Core Agreement Terms
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the transaction and operational terms for Asset Purchase Agreement. The parties agree to coordinate in good faith to complete milestones, share resources, or grant rights as specified.

clauses.heading: 2. Purchase Price Allocation
clauses.body: Buyer {buyer_name} buys the assets: {assets_purchased} from Seller {seller_name} for {purchase_price}.

clauses.heading: 3. Proprietary Information and Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all financial metrics, corporate plans, cap tables, and research files received during the execution of this Agreement as confidential and proprietary.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Why choose an asset sale over a stock sale?
faq.answer: Asset sales allow buyers to choose the specific assets they want and leave behind corporate liabilities and old tax disputes.

faq.question: What happens to old contracts in an asset sale?
faq.answer: Contracts do not transfer automatically. They must be explicitly assigned to and assumed by the buyer.
